issues.title: Invalid table reference
issues.problem: The query references a table 'employees' which does not exist in the provided schema.

issues.title: Missing condition in WHERE clause
issues.problem: The WHERE clause is empty, which will result in a syntax error.

issues.title: Ambiguous column reference
issues.problem: The column 'name' is ambiguous as it is not clear which table it belongs to.

issues.title: Lack of comments
issues.problem: The query lacks comments explaining the logic or purpose.
issues.fix: -- Query to get merchant names and transaction dates for completed transactions

review.corrected_sql: SELECT dm.merchant_name, ft.transaction_date FROM sigma_analytics.fact_transactions ft JOIN sigma_analytics.dim_merchant dm ON ft.merchant_id = dm.merchant_id WHERE ft.status = 'COMPLETED'
review.summary: The query had critical correctness issues due to invalid table references and missing conditions. Readability was also improved by specifying table aliases and adding comments.
